parameters.query: SELECT id, remote_jid, push_name, sender, date_time, conversation FROM mensajes WHERE conversation IS NOT NULL AND conversation <> '' ORDER BY remote_jid, date_time ASC LIMIT 500;
INSERT INTO chunks (rango_inicio, rango_fin, remote_jid, participantes, mensajes_ids, texto_concatenado) VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6) RETURNING id;
